docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: STEPHANIE LOUISE GORDON); (**NO SIGNATURE** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED APR-05-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GPMSF INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KEALAN CUNNINGHAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GPMSF INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MEGAN GUERIN, PRESIDENT WITH WITNESS NANETTE BARR, PROPERTY MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUNNINGHAM, KEALAN AS TO DEFENDANT GPMSF INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUNNINGHAM, KEALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GPMSF INC. $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $765.00 FILED BY CUNNINGHAM, KEALAN AS TO DEFENDANT GPMSF INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2022 - JUDGMENT.
